queries.question: For every circle, show the performer there.
queries.sql: select circles.name , performers.type from CirclePerformers join Performers on CirclePerformers.performer_id = Performers.id join Circles on CirclePerformers.circle_id = Circles.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?circleperformers a :CirclePerformers .
  ?performers a :Performers .
  ?circleperformers p:hasPerformers ?performers .
  ?circles a :Circles .
  ?circleperformers p:hasCircles ?circles .
  ?circles p:name ?name .
  ?performers p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: What performer is there in every circus?
queries.sql: SELECT Performers.type  from CirclePerformers join Performers on CirclePerformers.performer_id = Performers.id join Circles on CirclePerformers.circle_id = Circles.id   GROUP BY CirclePerformers.performer_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CirclePerformers.circle_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Circles)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What performer is there in every circus?
